[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00100000 1
1 00000100 1
2 00000111 3
3 00001111 4
4 00000010 1
5 00001001 2
6 10000101 3
7 00000000 a
